title: Skill Lockfile
description: Schema for .github/skills/skill-lockfile.json written by pin() and read by verify() in cli-adapter.js (ADR-016). WS4.3 hash verification reads the sha256 field from each skills entry.

schemaVersion.description: Semver schema version string (e.g. "1.0.0") — enables forward-compatible migration.

pinnedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which pin() was last called.

skills.description: One entry per SKILL.md file found recursively under .github/skills/ at pin time.

skill.description: Name of the skill directory (parent directory of SKILL.md).

path.description: Relative path from the repository root to the SKILL.md file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the SKILL.md file's UTF-8 byte content at pin time. Used by WS4.3 hash verification workstream.
